Class Secretary

java.lang.Object
  |
  +--Employee
        |
        +--Secretary
public class Secretary
extends Employee

Secretary class which is derived from the Employee class. The only difference is that Secretary has a healthplan variable.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
Jamie's Page
